name: Reservoir Minerals Inc.
description: Reservoir Minerals Inc. was an international mineral exploration and development company focused on the identification, acquisition, and exploration of precious and base metal deposits. Headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, the company primarily operated in Europe and West Africa, with a notable focus on copper and gold projects in Serbia, such as the Timok Copper-Gold Project. The company was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol RMC until it was acquired by Nevsun Resources Ltd. in 2016.
